generator.name: Threat Hunters Web Scanner
generator.honesty_note: This file is written as a real-target scanner output/replay file. It uses real URLs, full payload links, curl commands, baseline URLs, expected indicators, severity, confidence, and safety flags. A finding should be treated as live_response_confirmed only after your scanner replays the safe request and matches the indicators.
generator.payload_links_note: Each finding includes payload_replay / real_test_replay data with a full URL or concrete request data. Unsafe, login-required, or state-changing checks are not promoted to the safe copy-paste URL index.

target.name: Acunetix testasp vulnweb
target.scope: Public Acunetix intentionally vulnerable ASP web application only
target.authorization_basis: Acunetix documentation lists testasp.vulnweb.com as a configured test scan target, and the site warning says it is intentionally vulnerable to SQL injection, directory traversal, and other web attacks.
out_of_scope: Do not scan unrelated vulnweb hosts unless added separately
Do not run high-rate DoS tests
Do not attack infrastructure outside the web app

scan.live_confirmation_policy: set live_response_confirmed=true only after scanner replay validates expected indicators

top_risks: SQL injection on showforum.asp?id and Templatize.asp?item
Reflected XSS / HTML injection on Search.asp?tfSearch
Directory traversal / local file include candidate on Templatize.asp?item
Missing security headers and anti-CSRF controls
Application error disclosure and HTTP parameter override behavior

normalized_findings.title: Reflected XSS in Search.asp tfSearch parameter - script tag reflection
evidence: Publicly indexed vulnerable URL examples show tfSearch reflecting active script/HTML payloads.
The target is a real Acunetix intentionally vulnerable ASP web application.
expected_indicators: payload appears unescaped in HTML response

avoid_false_positive_by: compare with baseline clean request
require payload reflection or SQL/error behavior difference
do not mark confirmed from status code alone

normalized_findings.remediation: HTML-encode search output in the correct context; apply CSP as defense-in-depth; reject unsafe markup in tfSearch.

normalized_findings.title: SQL Injection candidate in Search.asp tfSearch parameter - payload '
evidence: External ZAP/ModSecurity virtual patching example identifies tfSearch on Search.asp as SQL Injection and SQL Injection Fingerprinting.
A search-result page for tfSearch=' is indexed for this target.

avoid_false_positive_by: compare with baseline clean request
require payload reflection or SQL/error behavior difference
do not mark confirmed from status code alone

normalized_findings.remediation: Use parameterized SQL queries for search; never concatenate tfSearch into SQL; normalize and validate input length/characters.

sqli_validation_hint.expected_result: Look for database error text, SQL/ODBC/JET/SQL Server exception, or strong content-length/content-diff from baseline.

normalized_findings.title: SQL Injection in showforum.asp id parameter - payload 'UNION'
evidence: OpenVAS sample report lists /showforum.asp?id payload variants as vulnerable to SQL injection techniques on testasp.vulnweb.com.
The same report states attackers may exploit the flaw to bypass authentication or control the remote database.
expected_indicators: SQL error or altered forum listing
response body differs from id=0 baseline
no normal forum content for malformed id

scanner_validation_logic.primary_match: SQL error or altered forum listing
avoid_false_positive_by: compare with baseline clean request
require payload reflection or SQL/error behavior difference
do not mark confirmed from status code alone

normalized_findings.remediation: Cast id to integer server-side and use parameterized queries; return generic errors; block non-numeric id values.

sqli_validation_hint.expected_result: Look for database error text, SQL/ODBC/JET/SQL Server exception, or strong content-length/content-diff from baseline.

normalized_findings.title: SQL Injection in Templatize.asp item parameter - payload 'UNION'
evidence: OpenVAS sample report lists /Templatize.asp?item payload variants as vulnerable to SQL injection techniques on testasp.vulnweb.com.
Templatize.asp is also discovered as a CGI endpoint with an item parameter.

avoid_false_positive_by: compare with baseline clean request
require payload reflection or SQL/error behavior difference
do not mark confirmed from status code alone

normalized_findings.remediation: Do not use request-controlled values in SQL; parameterize all queries and validate item against a strict allowlist.

sqli_validation_hint.expected_result: Look for database error text, SQL/ODBC/JET/SQL Server exception, or strong content-length/content-diff from baseline.

normalized_findings.title: Local file include through Templatize.asp item - include ASP file
evidence: The target site warning says the forum is intentionally vulnerable to directory traversal and other web attacks.
Templatize.asp accepts a user-controlled item parameter and is indexed with arbitrary item values.

avoid_false_positive_by: compare with baseline clean request
require payload reflection or SQL/error behavior difference
do not mark confirmed from status code alone

normalized_findings.remediation: Replace item with server-side template identifiers; enforce strict allowlist; canonicalize paths and prevent ../ or backslash traversal.

normalized_findings.title: Content Security Policy header missing
evidence: No Content-Security-Policy header observed in public ZAP baseline example for this host.

avoid_false_positive_by: compare with baseline clean request
require payload reflection or SQL/error behavior difference
do not mark confirmed from status code alone

normalized_findings.remediation: Harden HTTP response headers, remove unnecessary disclosures, and add anti-CSRF protection where state-changing forms exist.

normalized_findings.title: X-Content-Type-Options header missing
evidence: ZAP baseline example lists X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing for testasp.vulnweb.com.

avoid_false_positive_by: compare with baseline clean request
require payload reflection or SQL/error behavior difference
do not mark confirmed from status code alone

normalized_findings.remediation: Harden HTTP response headers, remove unnecessary disclosures, and add anti-CSRF protection where state-changing forms exist.

normalized_findings.remediation: Harden HTTP response headers, remove unnecessary disclosures, and add anti-CSRF protection where state-changing forms exist.

normalized_findings.title: Microsoft IIS version disclosure
evidence: Historical OpenVAS sample report detected Microsoft IIS Webserver Version 6.0 from IIS/6.0 banner; marked low confidence because the report is old.

avoid_false_positive_by: compare with baseline clean request
require payload reflection or SQL/error behavior difference
do not mark confirmed from status code alone

normalized_findings.remediation: Harden HTTP response headers, remove unnecessary disclosures, and add anti-CSRF protection where state-changing forms exist.

normalized_findings.title: Login bypass SQL Injection candidate in Login.asp POST credentials
evidence: Third-party writeup discusses login bypass testing on vulnweb, but the visible snippet mixes target URLs; keep this as manual candidate, not confirmed.

avoid_false_positive_by: compare with baseline clean request
require payload reflection or SQL/error behavior difference
do not mark confirmed from status code alone

normalized_findings.remediation: Use parameterized authentication queries, generic login errors, account lockout, and CSRF protection.

payload_replay.disabled_reason: This finding needs a POST/form request, so a URL alone is not enough.

sqli_validation_hint.expected_result: Look for database error text, SQL/ODBC/JET/SQL Server exception, or strong content-length/content-diff from baseline.

negative_findings.title: HTTPS/TLS posture not assessed for http target
negative_findings.reason: Submitted URL uses HTTP and live network testing was not executed by the generator.

negative_findings.title: Authenticated-only forum actions not fully assessed
negative_findings.reason: No account was created and no state-changing requests were executed.

scanner_should_run: GET SQLi error/differential checks for showforum.asp?id, Search.asp?tfSearch, Templatize.asp?item
security header checks on /, Search.asp, Login.asp, Register.asp
scanner_should_not_run_automatically: login bypass attempts unless in real-test mode
directory traversal reading OS files unless explicit real-test flag is enabled

payload_url_index.description: Ready-to-use payload list appended for Threat Hunters import. Safe GET URLs can be copy/pasted or replayed by the scanner. Manual entries require auth, POST, or state-changing handling. Blocked entries are intentionally not promoted as runnable URLs.
